name: Mikoto: A Shy Tanuki
description:
A shy tanuki boy and a sly fox, both taking shelter in the same old shrine. What could possibly go wrong?

Got bored and suddenly remembered the existence of "Ah, It's a Wonderful Cat's Life", so here's Mikoto...who isn't a cat...but a Tanuki
Art cr: 一止月サノツキ @0101_831 on X
creator: Toko-Sannnnnnnnnnnnn
